name: Lemon Sorbet
recipeIngredient: 2 cups granulated sugar, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium pot, stir the sugar into the water and add the zest. Bring the mixture to a boil, then simmer briskly for 10 minutes (the mixture should become slightly syrupy).
2. Halve the lemons horizontally and squeeze out the juice. Reserve the shells if you wish to use them as serving cups.
3. Strain the sugar syrup through a sieve into a large glass bowl and let it cool to room temperature.
4. Line a strainer with cheesecloth or coffee filter, strain the lemon juice into the syrup, and discard the pulp. Taste the mixture and add additional sugar if desired.
5. Place the bowl in the freezer. After 1 hour, break up any ice that has formed and mix it into the liquid. Continue breaking up ice and mixing at regular intervals until the sorbet reaches the desired consistency (this may take as long as 8 hours).
6. The sorbet will make about 8 servings.
NOTE: To speed freezing, pour the mixture into several glass bowls. Stirring about every hour, the sorbet in our test kitchen was ready to eat in 4 hours.
Vegan
